page_header.label: ABOUT
page_header.title: Building the Confidential Layer for Solana
page_header.description: We believe financial privacy is a fundamental right, not a feature.

sections.text: We believe financial privacy is a fundamental right, not a feature.

paragraphs: In an era where digital transactions leave permanent footprints, ZKIRA Pay stands as a guardian of financial autonomy. We're building the infrastructure that allows individuals and businesses to transact with confidence, knowing their financial activities remain private and secure.

Our approach to privacy is different. Rather than obfuscating transactions through complex mixing protocols, ZKIRA uses stealth addresses and escrow mechanisms to create a clean, auditable, and truly private payment experience on Solana. Every transaction is direct, every privacy mechanism is transparent, and every user maintains complete control.

Privacy shouldn't be a luxury reserved for the technical elite. ZKIRA makes confidential payments accessible to everyone through intuitive interfaces, seamless wallet integrations, and gas-sponsored transactions that remove friction at every step.

items.title: Self-Custody First
items.description: Your keys, your coins, your data. ZKIRA never has access to your funds or transaction details. Everything is self-custodial and runs on deterministic smart contracts.

items.title: Open Source Always
items.description: Full transparency through open-source code. Every smart contract, every cryptographic implementation, every line of frontend code is available for community review and contribution.

items.title: Privacy by Default
items.description: Privacy shouldn't be an opt-in feature. Our protocols are designed with privacy as the foundation, not an afterthought. Every transaction is confidential by design.

sections.heading: The Team
sections.subtitle: Our team operates under pseudonyms—a common practice in crypto that aligns with our privacy values.

members.description: Cryptography researcher with 8+ years in zero-knowledge proofs and privacy-preserving protocols. Previously contributed to Zcash and Monero research.
Solana ecosystem veteran with expertise in Anchor framework and on-chain program optimization. Former Solana Labs contributor.
Full-stack developer specializing in wallet integrations and cryptographic UX. Obsessed with making complex protocols feel simple.
Developer advocate and technical writer. Bridges the gap between cutting-edge cryptography and practical implementation.

sections.title: Join Us
sections.description: We're building the future of private payments. Join our community of developers, researchers, and privacy advocates who believe financial autonomy is worth fighting for.
